comments.body:
Hello Ella,

Upon checking from our end, we could see that all the 4 label failed orders have the product "Possessed Magazine - One Size (SKU - 34023-00003)" and for this product, the customs value for US is given as 1.

Due to the conversion with USD and Euros, 1 USD is considered as 0.86 Euros and the same is passed to FedEx.

As FedEx need a minimum value of 1 as the customs value, the label generation failed with the error message "Invalid Customs Value".

So, for the current orders, to resolve the case, please Navigate to the Products -> All Products -> search for the product Possessed Magazine - One Size (SKU - 34023-00003) -> Click on the Variant Name -> Under Country‑Based Custom Values, update the value as 2 and Save.
Once done, let us know. We will reprocess the orders and try generating the label for an order from ur end to check.

Meanwhile, i will have this case checked with our technical team as well.

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/J84SBgrBQ7NrKyGqYih6vQgOQ/?name=image.png)

 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/BsrjnSPGhJy2n7UWsbeoZdEqy/?name=image.png)

Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ella,
 
Upon checking from our end, we could see that all the 4 label failed orders have the product "Possessed Magazine - One Size (SKU - 34023-00003)" and for this product, the customs value for US is given as 1. 
 
Due to the conversion with USD and Euros, 1 USD is considered as 0.86 Euros and the same is passed to FedEx. 
 
As FedEx need a minimum value of 1 as the customs value, the label generation failed with the error message "Invalid Customs Value". 
 
So, for the current orders, to resolve the case, please Navigate to the Products -> All Products -> search for the product Possessed Magazine - One Size (SKU - 34023-00003) -> Click on the Variant Name -> Under Country‑Based Custom Values, update the value as 2 and Save. 
Once done, let us know. We will reprocess the orders and try generating the label for an order from ur end to check. 
 
Meanwhile, i will have this case checked with our technical team as well. 
 

 

 
Thanks and Regards,
Sagar K S
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
L3 - Label generation is failing with the error message "Invalid Customs Value"

For the orders 112295, 112261, 112220 and 112259 which are to US, the label generation is failing. All these orders have same product "Possessed Magazine - One Size (SKU - 34023-00003)" and the customer has provided country based customs value selecting US and the value as 1.

Under the App Settings -> General Settings -> Shipping, the Preferred Shipment Currency is provided as Shipment Source Currency and the Minimum Value for Customs/Insured Amount is 1.

In the label request, the customs amount passed is 0.86 Euros (converted from 1 USD to 0.86 Euros) and as this has not met carrier's minimum criteria, the label generation failed.

Also, we are not sure why the minimum value 1 is not considered in this case.

I have attached the Request Response XMLs of a label failed order for reference.

This has been checked with Keerthi as well.

So, could you please check about this case and provide an update?

Store URL - satisfyrunning.myshopify.com
App - Shopify MCSL
comments.html_body:
L3 - Label generation is failing with the error message "Invalid Customs Value"
 
For the orders 112295, 112261, 112220 and 112259 which are to US, the label generation is failing. All these orders have same product "Possessed Magazine - One Size (SKU - 34023-00003)" and the customer has provided country based customs value selecting US and the value as 1. 
 
Under the App Settings -> General Settings -> Shipping, the Preferred Shipment Currency is provided as Shipment Source Currency and the Minimum Value for Customs/Insured Amount is 1. 
 
In the label request, the customs amount passed is 0.86 Euros (converted from 1 USD to 0.86 Euros) and as this has not met carrier's minimum criteria, the label generation failed. 
 
Also, we are not sure why the minimum value 1 is not considered in this case. 
 
I have attached the Request Response XMLs of a label failed order for reference. 
 
This has been checked with Keerthi as well. 
 
So, could you please check about this case and provide an update?
 
Store URL - satisfyrunning.myshopify.com 
App - Shopify MCSL
